Description: Add these two rules to the Web ACL on your CloudFront distribution. Rule 1 must run before Rule 2.

Rules.Name: AkamaiXFFHandling
Rules.Comment: MUST run first. Reads the real client IP from X-Forwarded-For when Akamai proxies the request. Without this Bot Control only sees Akamai IP not the real user IP.

Rules.Name: BotControlRuleGroup
Rules.Comment: Bot Control runs AFTER Rule 1. Set to Count mode first to monitor before enabling block.

AfterTesting.Comment: Once both rules are confirmed working in Count mode, change OverrideAction on BotControlRuleGroup from Count to None to enable blocking.
